mapper.select: SELECT id, employee_id, leave_type, start_time, end_time, days, reason, status, created_at, updated_at FROM leave_record WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} AND status != '已取消' ORDER BY start_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO leave_record (employee_id, leave_type, start_time, end_time, reason, status) VALUES (#{employeeId}, #{leaveType}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{reason}, COALESCE(#{status}, '已记录'))
mapper.update: UPDATE leave_record SET employee_id = #{employeeId}, leave_type = #{leaveType}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, reason = #{reason}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
